diagrams.title: Virtual Address Translation in Paging
diagrams.description: Shows how virtual address is translated to physical address using page table
elements: Page Table Entry (Frame Number, Valid Bit)
diagrams.purpose: Understanding address translation process in paging systems

diagrams.title: Page Replacement Flow
diagrams.description: Flowchart showing steps when a page fault occurs and memory is full
elements: If No Free Frame: Run Replacement Algorithm
Read Page from Disk to Frame
diagrams.purpose: Understanding demand paging and page replacement process

diagrams.title: Disk Head Movement - SCAN Algorithm
diagrams.description: Demonstrates how SCAN algorithm services requests by moving back and forth
diagrams.purpose: Visualizing disk scheduling and head movement patterns
